economic_notes: Three government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis: Chippewa Industrial Developments Ltd, Ojibwe Legends Trading Company Ltd (dissolved during year), Ojibwe Filters and Industrial Supplies Ltd (dissolved during year). Net investment in energy projects of $33,713,862 across three energy corporations (Giiwedin Noodin FN Energy Corporation, 2401077 Ontario Inc., 2479793 Ontario Inc.). Adelaide wind project, Grand Bend wind project, and Romney wind project generating revenue. Net earnings from investment in energy projects $6,300,107.
notes: Fiscal year 2023 (year ended March 31, 2023). Three GBEs on modified equity basis; Ojibwe Filters and Industrial Supplies Ltd. and Ojibwe Legends Trading Company Ltd. were both dissolved during the year. Energy project investments reported on net basis due to limited recourse debt (waterfall clauses). Net earnings from investment in energy projects $6,300,107 recorded separately from operations. Transfer of CMHC units ($443,896) recorded as reduction to surplus. ISC funding calculated as Grant + Fixed contribution + Set contribution = $368,376 + $3,864,600 + $293,948 = $4,527,924. Total government transfers include ISC + Health Canada + CMHC + Other federal + Province of Ontario + Southern First Nations Secretariat + Union of Ontario Indians + Stepping Stones + Kinomaadswin + SWOHAC = $4,527,924 + $2,524,458 + $309,964 + $422,945 + $2,197,930 + $452,486 + $620,367 + $1,465,006 + $6,266,145 + $72,813 = $13,807,543 (Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership treated as OSR as it is a partnership distribution). Expenses by schedule: Community Services $17,103,439, Economic Development $1,062,858, Housing $999,413, General $6,635,134. Salaries and wages $7,482,510 + employee benefits $1,545,708 = $9,028,218. Contingent liabilities include claims of $21,500,000 and $4,500,000 post year-end, evaluated as unlikely. No remuneration schedule provided in extracted text. Council honoraria listed in expenditure by object: council $167,823, community $31,830, staff $56,300. Budget column present but not reported as separate year.
